name: smoke-tests
description: Quick smoke tests to verify gateway connectivity and basic functionality

tests.name: List available CAN and Ethernet interfaces
tests.description: Verify the gateway responds and lists its registered interfaces
steps: Run `boat frame list-ifaces` to list all registered bus interfaces
Verify the output contains expected CAN and Ethernet interfaces

tests.name: Send 1000 CAN frames with 1ms delay and random payload
tests.description: Burst 1000 CAN frames on vcan0 via FrameNode and verify no failures
steps: Connect FrameNode to gateway at localhost:50051
Loop 1000 iterations: generate random 1-8 byte payload and send CAN frame on vcan0 with ID 0x100
Print summary statistics and return non-zero exit code if any frames failed
